summary: The diff modifies CreateLawTokenDialog.tsx to use parentLocation.parentSwarmId when calling actor.createLocation, which is intended to fix the 'Parent Swarm does not exist' error. However, the diff does not show any changes to SwarmDetailView itself — where the swarm ID should be read from the view's own state/props and passed into the dialog. Without seeing SwarmDetailView changes, it is unclear whether the swarm ID is actually being injected from the swarm detail view's state/props correctly.

missing_requirements.requirement: In SwarmDetailView, when the Yes or No plus button is clicked, automatically pass the currently displayed swarm's ID as the parent swarm ID into the dialog's creation call. The swarm ID must be read directly from the swarm detail view's own state/props.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows no modifications to SwarmDetailView. There is no evidence that SwarmDetailView was updated to read its own swarm ID from state/props and pass it into CreateLawTokenDialog. The fix in CreateLawTokenDialog relies on parentLocation.parentSwarmId, but it is unknown whether SwarmDetailView correctly populates this field when opening the dialog.
